title: FrontRES Runtime Flow Tree
subtitle: Execution order from train.py to diagnostics. Node IDs match the repository map.

children.title: Runner init / resume
children.role: Set phase, resume state, policy, algorithm, and storage contracts.

children.title: Sample perturbation family
children.role: Choose artifact family mix allowed by the active repair cone.

children.title: Probe GMT frontier
children.role: Estimate current executable DR boundary and train scale.

children.title: Build FrontRES rollout
children.role: Collect Noisy, Candidate, Projected, and GMT evidence for the batch.

children.title: HSL repair proposal
children.role: Predict geometric Delta SE repair candidate.

children.title: Executable Floor
children.role: Convert frontier evidence into a shared floor value and pass/adapt masks.

children.title: State alpha target
children.role: Build state-risk signal from floor evidence before rho credit assignment.

children.title: Structured rho carrier
children.role: Represent repair retention without reviving old scalar acceptance semantics.

children.title: Rho advantage evidence
children.role: Compare rollout utility and build signed repair-retention advantage.

children.title: Write storage contract
children.role: Persist alpha targets, rho carrier, executable floor, masks, and rewards.

children.title: Transition fields
children.role: Store batch tensors with stable semantics.

children.title: Minibatch contract
children.role: Expose the same tensors to the algorithm update.

children.title: Algorithm update
children.role: Apply PPO boundary plus FrontRES-specific losses.

children.title: Alpha SSL update
children.role: Train state-risk branch from floor-derived targets.

children.title: Structured rho RL update
children.role: Update repair-retention carrier from advantage; leave legacy accept pref disabled.

children.title: Print live diagnostics
children.role: Prove each concept is connected to the active runtime path.

children.title: Floor / alpha diagnostics
children.role: Floor value, pass/adapt ratio, alpha target/pred/accuracy.

children.title: Rho diagnostics
children.role: Rho direction, constrained advantage, active weight, regret.

children.title: Loss-path diagnostics
children.role: Enabled losses, disabled legacy paths, and gradient boundary hints.
